title: Parameters for Speed Scale Corrector Module

update_interval.description: Timer interval for estimation updates and maximum allowed timestamp difference between pose, IMU, and velocity report in seconds. Unit is **[s]**.

initial_speed_scale_factor.description: Initial speed scale factor value used before estimation begins. Typically set to 1.0 for no initial correction.

initial_speed_scale_factor_covariance.description: Initial covariance of the speed scale factor state (P).

process_noise_covariance.description: Process noise covariance of the speed scale factor state (Q).

measurement_noise_covariance.description: Measurement noise covariance used in the Kalman filter update (R).

max_angular_velocity.description: Maximum allowed IMU angular velocity in rad/s. Samples exceeding this value are filtered out to avoid estimation during sharp turns. Unit is **[rad/s]**.

max_speed.description: Maximum allowed odometry velocity in m/s. Samples exceeding this value are filtered out to avoid extreme speeds that may cause inaccurate estimation. Unit is **[m/s]**.

min_speed.description: Minimum required odometry velocity in m/s. Samples below this value are filtered out to ensure sufficient motion for reliable estimation. Unit is **[m/s]**.
